name: multi-channel
description: Unified social and advertising command center. Manages social inbox, optimizes ad performance, tracks keywords, coordinates messaging across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, and Pinterest.
capabilities: Unify social inbox from 8 platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, Pinterest)
Manage advertising campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok with unified dashboard
Analyze keyword performance and audience signals for targeted marketing
Coordinate cross-platform messaging for product launches and campaigns
Generate platform-specific best practices for content strategy
Track and optimize ad performance metrics (CPM, CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS)
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill with no executable code. Contains only markdown content describing marketing strategies. The static scanner produced false positives by misidentifying markdown code block syntax (backticks) as shell execution and marketing terminology as security patterns. The skill-report.json at lines 37-40 confirms this is a pure prompt-based skill with no scripts, network calls, or filesystem access.
valueStatement: Marketing teams struggle to coordinate messaging across 8+ platforms while tracking performance and optimizing ad spend. This skill provides a unified command center for social inbox management, campaign coordination, and cross-platform strategy across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, and Pinterest.
userTitle: Manage multi-channel social media and ads
limitations: No real-time social listening or automated monitoring
No AI-powered content generation or automated posting
No actual API integrations with platforms (requires external setup)
No competitor monitoring or automated alerts

useCases.title: Coordinate multi-platform campaigns
useCases.description: Plan and execute coordinated campaigns across 8 platforms with consistent messaging and budget allocation

useCases.title: Manage social inbox efficiently
useCases.description: Aggregate and prioritize customer messages from all social platforms in one unified view

useCases.title: Optimize ad performance
useCases.description: Track ad metrics across platforms and receive optimization recommendations for better ROI

promptTemplates.title: Check inbox
promptTemplates.prompt: Check my social inbox for the last 24 hours. Show me all messages categorized by priority (urgent, high, medium, low). List any customer complaints or questions that need immediate attention.

promptTemplates.title: Campaign analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me the performance of my advertising campaigns across all platforms for the last 30 days. Include impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROI by platform. Identify any underperforming campaigns.

promptTemplates.title: Launch strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a coordinated cross-platform campaign for my product launch in 4 weeks. The product is a project management tool for small teams. Budget is $5,000. Provide platform-by-platform strategy, messaging, content types, and timeline.

promptTemplates.title: Keyword research
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze the following keywords for my SaaS product: project management software, team collaboration tools, remote work productivity. For each, provide search volume, competition, CPC, and profitability estimate.

bestPractices: Prioritize messages using the 4-tier system: Urgent (complaints, technical issues), High (business inquiries, VIP customers), Medium (feedback, compliments), Low (casual discussion)
Use platform-specific best practices for content format, posting times, hashtag usage, and engagement tone
Track performance metrics consistently across platforms to identify which channels deliver best ROI for your goals
antiPatterns: Posting identical content across all platforms without adapting to platform culture and format norms
Ignoring platform-specific peak times and posting when your audience is least active
Spamming all platforms with promotional content instead of providing value and building community

faq.question: Which platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, Reddit, and Pinterest for social. Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and TikTok Ads for advertising.

faq.question: What are the limits of this skill?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance and recommendations. It does not post content, access live APIs, or automate responses without your approval.

faq.question: Does this integrate with existing marketing tools?
faq.answer: The skill describes integration points with platforms like Buffer, Hootsuite, Google Analytics, and design tools, but requires separate setup for actual connections.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: This is a prompt-based skill with no code execution. It only processes the text you provide in conversations and does not store or transmit data externally.

faq.question: Why are my ad metrics different from the skill recommendations?
faq.answer: The skill provides general benchmarks and best practices. Your actual results depend on your audience, creative quality, targeting, and market conditions.

faq.question: How is this different from dedicated social media management tools?
faq.answer: This skill provides AI-powered strategy guidance and coordination templates rather than posting automation. It works alongside dedicated tools to improve your marketing decisions.
